title: Inflation expected to ease in 2027 but prolonged Middle East conflict may keep prices high, slow growth: MAS

title: Novo Nordisk Leverages AI in Weight-Loss Drug Race
description: Danish drugmaker Novo Nordisk has announced a partnership with OpenAI to integrate artificial intelligence into their operations, aiming to enhance drug discovery, manufacturing, and commercial processes. This strategic move seeks to bolster their position against competitors like Eli Lilly in the booming weight-loss drug market.
